name: Unitary
description: Unitary — multimodal content moderation API for video, image, and text with contextual understanding.

seo.title: Unitary — Content Moderation API
seo.meta_description: Unitary: Unitary — multimodal content moderation API for video, image, and text with contextual understanding.

when_to_use: Detecting harmful video content with multimodal AI classification
Running contextual video moderation beyond frame-level analysis
Building brand safety workflows for video advertising platforms
Classifying video content for harmful, illegal, or sensitive material

pros: Multimodal understanding across video, image, text
Modern ML stack, not legacy classifiers
Useful for brand-safety and UGC platforms
cons: Video inference cost can add up
Limited public case studies to benchmark
review.verdict: Promising modern multimodal moderation API; validate on your content mix before betting core infra on it.
review.best_for: Video-heavy UGC, ad-tech, and brand-safety use cases needing contextual multimodal scoring.
review.not_for: Text-only or small-scale use cases where cheaper specialized tools suffice.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence
